prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DIABURRSET120-30PC Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Assorted Diamond Burrs 120 Grit 30 Pieces Description: Carve, etch, grind and sand like a pro with the Universal Tool 30 Piece Assorted Diamond Burrs Set.

This set comes with 30 different diamond burrs for working with ceramics, tile, stone, glass, wood and more. Inside the set, you'll find several different types of burrs: cylinder, rounded cylinders, cones, balls, trees, and flames. These different types of burrs will ensure that you have the correct style for any project you're working on. All of the burrs are made with high-quality steel and are diamond dust-coated which will provide the most precise carvings.

Each burr has a shank of 1/8" and measures 1.75" in length, making them compatible with most standard rotary tools. They have a grit of 120, and all fit neatly inside of the included black and teal storage case. The case itself is made of durable plastic with sturdy snap closure, and the case has a transparent lid so you can easily identify which burr you need to use while keeping the others organized. This is an essential set of diamond burrs for any crafter, hobbyist or home improvement enthusiast. Search Terms: crafting tools hobby drill bur sets rotary burr tool grinding carving etching sanding 120 grit burrs 130 140 150 diamond coated hand Features: - ASSORTED BURR HEADS - Comes with Cylinder, Rounded Cylinders, Cones, Balls, Trees and Flame Burrs for Variety of Projects | 30 Total Pieces - VERSATILE TOOLS - Carve, Etch, Grind and Sand Like a Pro | Ideal for Use on Ceramics, Tile, Stone, Glass, Wood and More - DIAMOND COATED - High-quality Steel Burrs Coated in #2 Diamond Particles for Fine Detail Work | Material Used for Precision Cutting, Engraving, Touch-ups and Finishing - 1/8" SHANK AND 120 GRIT - Standard Shank Size Burrs Fit Most Standard Rotary Tools | 1.75" Length Burrs - COMPACT STORAGE CASE - Comes with Durable Plastic 6" x 2.5" Storage Case | Transparent Lid to Easily Identify Tool Needed | Store Burrs Safely When Not in Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
